final:
module lfsr (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00000;
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[2]};
        end
    end
endmodule
